name: release-branch-operations
default_program: [stages: preflight>plan>act>verify>handoff | scope: repo | policy: composable-atomic-steps,deterministic-output | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: SOURCE_BRANCH
required_inputs.description: Integration source branch to move into main.

required_inputs.name: RELEASE_TAGS
required_inputs.description: Ordered tags to materialize as release commits.

required_inputs.name: REMOTE_NAME
required_inputs.description: Remote to sync and push. Default: origin.
